content:
error pages → ring color `focus-visible:ring-coral/50` on error buttons
- For donation → ring color `focus-visible:ring-yellow-400/50`
- For `[tabIndex={0}]` progressbar elements → add `focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-cyan/50`
